creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Created attachment 207653
memory.good.state.txt

I wanted upgrade memory from 4GB to 8GB but 
i have still problem with panics. I did memory test
to 8g but nothig error in memory. 
In my opinion motherboard dont support timing 8g memory with other timing memory
and kernel then have this problem. In memout file is my current good state with 4GB.
I have problem with type of memory 8GB 2Rx8 PC3l 12800S - 11 - 13 - F3 HMT41GS6BFA8A - PB NO AA
